entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being evaluated for resistance to grain molds

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting the grain of sorghum

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO GRAIN MOLD
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to resist the development of grain mold

entities.name: OVERHEAD SPRINKLER IRRIGATION
entities.description: A technique used to promote grain mold development by simulating rainfall on rain-free days

entities.name: INOCULATION OF PANICLES
entities.description: A technique of applying mold-causing fungi to panicles to induce grain mold

entities.name: BAGGING OF PANICLES
entities.description: A technique of bagging panicles to promote the development of grain mold

entities.name: THRESHED GRAIN MOLD RATINGS
entities.description: A measurement system (TGMRs) used to quantify the severity of grain mold

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Environmental precipitation that influences the natural development of grain mold

entities.name: GRAIN GERMINATION
entities.description: The capacity of sorghum seeds to germinate, which can be affected by irrigation

entities.name: MOLD-CAUSING FUNGI
entities.description: The fungi responsible for causing grain mold in sorghum

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating sorghum lines for resistance to grain molds in a field setting
